signals.idea: Make VideoGenerationModal support two collapsible accordion sections: (1) Top section 'Shot Images' showing a batch image grid via ShotImagesEditor in read-only batch mode, (2) Bottom section 'Generation Settings' showing the current form content (BatchSettingsForm + MotionControl). Each section independently collapsible via defaultTopOpen/defaultBottomOpen props. When collapsed, each shows a compact summary (top: thumbnail strip + image count; bottom: model/frames/prompt one-liner). Current usage in VideoShotDisplay.tsx keeps current behavior (top closed, bottom open). Key files: VideoGenerationModal.tsx, VideoGenerationModalSections.tsx, useVideoGenerationModalController.ts. Generate button stays in always-visible footer.

unresolved_flags.concern: VideoGenerationModal callers: the plan only updates VideoShotDisplay, but this modal is also opened from the gallery and timeline editor. Because the accordion sections rely on CollapsibleSection defaultOpen and that shared component defaults to false, the plan leaves those two callers underspecified and can regress them to opening with both sections collapsed unless modal-level defaults are set explicitly.

VideoGenerationModal validation: the verification plan is too narrow for the files it changes. It only lists `npx tsc --noEmit` plus manual smoke checks, even though the touched sections/controller files already have direct Vitest coverage that will need updating and can fail independently of TypeScript compilation.

signals.loop_summary: Iteration 1. Weighted score trajectory: 3.5. Plan deltas: n/a. Recurring critiques: 0. Resolved flags: 0. Open significant flags: 2.

items.criterion: Modal renders two independently collapsible sections: 'Shot Images' (top) and 'Generation Settings' (bottom)
Top section shows ShotImagesEditor in readOnly batch mode when expanded
Bottom section shows BatchSettingsForm + MotionControl when expanded (identical to current form)
Each section shows a compact summary when collapsed (top: thumbnails + count; bottom: model/frames/prompt)
Generate button stays in always-visible footer regardless of section collapse state
Current VideoShotDisplay.tsx usage maintains current behavior (top closed, bottom open)
VideoGenerationModalProps accepts defaultTopOpen and defaultBottomOpen props
ShotImagesEditor in top section has no editing controls (mode switcher hidden, no drag/drop, no delete)
No changes to shared CollapsibleSection component
ReadOnlyShotImagesGrid wrapper isolates ShotImagesEditor prop boilerplate from layout code
Collapsed summaries update reactively when settings change (e.g., changing model while bottom is temporarily collapsed)
Smooth collapse/expand animation consistent with existing CollapsibleSection behavior
Manual smoke test: open modal, toggle both sections, generate video successfully

unresolved_flags.concern: VideoGenerationModal callers: the plan only updates VideoShotDisplay, but this modal is also opened from the gallery and timeline editor. Because the accordion sections rely on CollapsibleSection defaultOpen and that shared component defaults to false, the plan leaves those two callers underspecified and can regress them to opening with both sections collapsed unless modal-level defaults are set explicitly.
unresolved_flags.evidence: `src/shared/components/ui/composed/collapsible-section.tsx:22-38` sets `defaultOpen = false`. The plan only calls out `src/tools/travel-between-images/components/VideoGallery/VideoShotDisplay.tsx:327-332`, but `VideoGenerationModal` is also rendered at `src/features/gallery/components/GenerationsPane/components/GenerationsPaneGallery.tsx:262-269` and `src/tools/video-editor/components/TimelineEditor/TimelineEditor.tsx:664-671`.

unresolved_flags.concern: VideoGenerationModal validation: the verification plan is too narrow for the files it changes. It only lists `npx tsc --noEmit` plus manual smoke checks, even though the touched sections/controller files already have direct Vitest coverage that will need updating and can fail independently of TypeScript compilation.
unresolved_flags.evidence: Existing tests directly cover the affected surface in `src/tools/travel-between-images/components/VideoGenerationModalSections.test.tsx:1-163` and `src/tools/travel-between-images/components/hooks/useVideoGenerationModalController.test.tsx:175-305`, but plan step 7 only mentions TypeScript and manual UI verification.
